headline: Whitefield — 23 members showing churn signals
evidence: These 23 members joined as a corporate batch from Infosys in March. Attendance dropped sharply after November 15th, when their project sprint cycle ended. Corporate batch members who miss 2+ consecutive weeks before renewal historically churn at 71%.
recommended_action: Send personalized trainer check-in messages to all 23 members before the 6-week renewal window closes.
sample_whatsapp_message: Hi Rohit, Coach Anand here from PowerHouse Whitefield. We've missed you this week! I know project season gets intense. We've kept your usual 7 AM slot open — come in Thursday and I'll put together a quick program to help you reset. Just reply YES and it's booked.
